creator: fbsdbugs@codeslip.net
text:
Created attachment 253951
neovim update vimdoc tree-sitter parser to v3.0.0

The vimdoc tree sitter parser was updated to v3.0.0 on Jun 8, and had a breaking change:

* Anonymous node "~" in (column_heading) is now named node (delimiter) (#134)

I'm unsure when or why Neovim itself started having this issue, but this update fixes the problem.

(Apologies if I've made any errors in submission, here, this is my first time with a patch.)
